_comment: Example config/antigravity-accounts.json (LOCAL, gitignored). Holds only the antigravity Google-account rotation ORDER and the current INDEX - never a credential. Snapshots of each account's OAuth tokens live at ~/.gemini/fm-antigravity-accounts/snapshots/ (mode 600), not here. firstmate maintains this file via bin/fm-antigravity-accounts.sh (capture / set-rotation); you may also hand-edit the order. See docs/antigravity-rotation.md.
